sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10603" key="a)ntitimw/rhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιτῑμώρ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιτῑμωρ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10603.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vengeance, revenge,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1297</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
